search_queries_used: site:asahq.org preanesthesia family history previous anesthesia
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Anesthesia family history documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Anesthesia family history documentation
rejection_reasons: Family history alone must not be converted into a diagnosis or anesthesia plan.
The candidate source category "automatic genetic-risk conclusions" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients undergoing preanesthesia history review where a relevant family anesthesia or inherited-risk history is discussed.
setting_applicability: Direct for preanesthesia history documentation; genetic counseling, testing, and management remain specialist-led.
UAE_applicability: International ASA evidence; UAE consent, genetics, and facility pathways require local review.
recency_verification: ASA standard last affirmed 2020, current ASA 2023 statement, and current MHAUS FAQ were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer ASA basic standard or MHAUS FAQ was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA standard supports previous anesthesia and medical history obtained during the preanesthesia interview, including relevant family information when it affects anesthetic risk.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Anesthesia family history documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: The broad family-history workflow does not specify the relative, condition, verification, inheritance, testing, or anesthetic implications.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
